name: IOS-XE Web UI Privilege Escalation
description: Unauthenticated attacker can create an admin account via the IOS-XE web UI. Actively exploited in the wild.
recommendation: Disable HTTP/HTTPS server or upgrade to fixed release.

name: IOS-XE Web UI Command Injection
description: Chained with CVE-2023-20198 to gain root access via command injection in web UI. Actively exploited.
recommendation: Disable HTTP/HTTPS server or upgrade to fixed release.

name: Smart Install RCE
description: Unauthenticated RCE via Smart Install client in Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software.

name: SNMP Buffer Overflow RCE
description: Buffer overflow in SNMP subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE allows remote code execution.
recommendation: Restrict SNMP access and upgrade IOS.

name: DVMRP Memory Exhaustion DoS
description: Memory exhaustion via crafted IGMP traffic in Cisco IOS XR Software.

name: IOS-XE Web UI Command Injection
description: Authenticated command injection via the web UI of Cisco IOS XE Software.

name: CMP Telnet RCE (Vault 7)
description: A vulnerability in the Cluster Management Protocol (CMP) processing code in Cisco IOS allows unauthenticated remote code execution via Telnet.
recommendation: Disable Telnet. Upgrade to patched IOS version.

name: IKEv1 BENIGNCERTAIN Memory Disclosure
description: Information disclosure vulnerability in IKEv1 processing in Cisco IOS allows reading of device memory remotely.

name: ASA WebVPN Double-Free RCE
description: A double free vulnerability in the SSL VPN (WebVPN) feature of Cisco ASA allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
recommendation: Upgrade Cisco ASA to patched version.

name: ASA IKE Buffer Overflow
description: Buffer overflow in the IKE implementation on Cisco ASA allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: ASA/FTD Path Traversal File Read
description: A path traversal vulnerability in the web services interface of Cisco ASA and FTD allows reading of sensitive files.

name: ASA/FTD WebVPN DoS (ArcaneDoor)
description: A vulnerability in the management and VPN web servers allows denial of service. Part of the ArcaneDoor campaign.

name: ASA/FTD Persistent Backdoor (ArcaneDoor)
description: A vulnerability allows an attacker with administrator-level access to install persistent backdoor code. Part of the ArcaneDoor campaign.
recommendation: Upgrade ASA/FTD to patched version. Audit for compromise.

name: ASA/FTD VPN Brute Force Bypass
description: An improper separation of authentication/authorization allows attackers to brute-force VPN credentials without triggering lockout.

name: AnyConnect SSL VPN Buffer Overflow RCE
description: A buffer overflow in the SSL VPN module of Cisco Small Business routers allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: RV320/RV325 Information Disclosure
description: A vulnerability in Cisco Small Business RV320/RV325 routers allows unauthenticated access to device configuration.

name: RV320/RV325 Command Injection
description: A command injection vulnerability in Cisco Small Business RV320/RV325 routers allows authenticated RCE.

name: Small Business Router UPnP RCE
description: A buffer overflow in the UPnP service of Cisco Small Business RV routers allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: IP Phone CDP Stack Overflow
description: A stack-based buffer overflow in CDP processing code of Cisco IP phones allows remote code execution via crafted CDP packets.

name: HyperFlex HX Command Injection
description: A command injection vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco HyperFlex HX allows unauthenticated command execution.

name: HyperFlex Installer Agent RCE
description: A command injection in the HyperFlex installer agent allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: RV042 Deserialization RCE
description: A deserialization vulnerability in the web management interface of Cisco RV042 routers allows authenticated remote code execution.

name: RV016/RV042/RV082 Auth Bypass
description: A critical authentication bypass vulnerability in Cisco Small Business routers allows unauthenticated access to device management.
recommendation: No patch available. Migrate to supported platform.

name: ASA/FTD WebVPN XSS
description: Multiple cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in the web services interface of Cisco ASA/FTD.

name: ASA SIP Inspection DoS
description: A vulnerability in SIP inspection engine of Cisco ASA allows remote attackers to cause device reload via crafted SIP traffic.

name: ASA/FTD Web Services DoS
description: A denial of service vulnerability in the web services interface of Cisco ASA and FTD caused by improper input validation.

name: ASA/FTD Remote Access VPN DoS
description: A vulnerability in the remote access VPN feature of Cisco ASA/FTD allows denial of service via resource exhaustion.

name: CIMC Web UI Command Injection
description: A command injection vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco IMC allows authenticated remote code execution.

name: IOS XE REST API Auth Bypass
description: A vulnerability in the Cisco REST API virtual service container for Cisco IOS XE allows unauthenticated root access.
recommendation: Upgrade IOS XE to patched version.

name: Small Business RV340 Web Management RCE
description: Buffer overflow in the web management interface of Cisco Small Business RV340 series allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

name: Small Business Switch Buffer Overflow RCE
description: Multiple buffer overflow vulnerabilities in the web management interface of Cisco Small Business 220 Series Smart Switches.

name: ClamAV HFS+ Buffer Overflow RCE
description: A buffer overflow in the ClamAV HFS+ parser used by Cisco FTD allows remote code execution via crafted file.

name: ASA/FTD ASDM Package Verification Bypass
description: Cisco ASDM and ASA software do not properly verify the integrity of packages during deployment, allowing malicious code execution.

name: ASA/FTD Web Services Memory Leak
description: An information disclosure vulnerability in the web services interface of Cisco ASA/FTD allows reading of device memory.

name: ASA WebVPN Memory Leak DoS
description: Memory leak in WebVPN feature of Cisco ASA allows unauthenticated DoS via repeated connection attempts.

name: ASA/FTD WebVPN Path Traversal
description: A path traversal vulnerability in the web services interface of Cisco ASA/FTD allows deletion of files from the device.

name: Apache mod_proxy SSRF (affects Cisco)
description: SSRF vulnerability in Apache mod_proxy affects multiple Cisco products running embedded web servers.

name: Thrangrycat — Secure Boot Bypass
description: A vulnerability in the TAm (Trust Anchor module) of Cisco IOS allows manipulation of the FPGA bitstream for persistent implant.

name: ASA/FTD Restore Command Injection
description: A vulnerability in the command-line interface of Cisco ASA/FTD allows local command injection during configuration restore.
